seo.title: Cyril Cherpion | AV Pre-Sales Consultant & AI Architect
seo.description: Expert in AV pre-sales and AI-assisted systems design. 15 years of expertise.

name: Cyril Cherpion
sidebar_bio: AV Pre-Sales Consultant & AI Architect. I combine technical expertise with commercial vision to turn complex needs into profitable, innovative projects.
bio: 15 years of experience at the crossroads of technology and business. My gig? Turning "that'll never work" into profitable solutions. I speak fluent tech-to-human, drive high-value deals, and ensure optimal ROI for my clients.
work_sub: A curated collection of deals closed and challenges solved. A mix of high-tech, strategic negotiation, and precision.
path_sub: The scenic route through 15 years of technical and commercial evolution. From NYC studios to critical infrastructures and B2B deals.
dash_sub: Interactive high-end control interfaces for AI-assisted audiovisual systems. Ready for Crestron & Node-RED. Try the demo below.

expertise.name: Pre-Sales & Strategy
expertise.desc: RFP responses, precise budgeting (up to €1.5M), B2B negotiation, and tailored client consulting.

expertise.name: AV Design & Engineering
expertise.desc: Acoustic studies, critical flow architecture (Dante, SDVoE), and technical lighting.

expertise.name: Control & Automation
expertise.desc: Programming control systems (AMX MUSE, Crestron) and IoT management via Node-RED.

expertise.name: AI Architecture
expertise.desc: Integration of language models (Claude, Gemini) for technical systems assistance.

projects.name: Versailles Convention Center
projects.desc: Pre-Sales and AV Design for comprehensive venue integration.

projects.name: Airbus Safety Center
projects.desc: High-security AV engineering and integration for critical infrastructure.

projects.name: CD 31
projects.desc: Conference room equipped with NDI, LED Wall, and Live Streaming setup.

projects.name: Casino Barrière
projects.desc: Full control redesign & signal architecture for gaming environment.

projects.name: ATR Showroom

projects.name: FRAC Limoges

projects.name: SABOM

experiences.desc: Pre-sales, complex technical proposals, client demonstrations, and scripting (Node-RED, REST API).

experiences.role: Head of AV Design & Sales Support
experiences.desc: Technical direction and sales support. Complex budgeting, team supervision, and key account management.
Produced technical studies: Acoustics RT60, isolation STC, lighting DALI/DMX.
Managed corporate and education projects. Stakeholder coordination and site progress monitoring.
Feasibility studies for integrators and sensitive government/finance projects.
Managed technical logistics for events and led technical teams (2-6 members).
Live and studio engineering. Technical operations in New York and France.

education.desc: AMX-MUSE, Crestron, Dante (Levels 1-3), Q-SYS, Poly, Shure.
Modern web technologies: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Node.js.
Advanced studio operations and audio production.
Acoustics, signal theory, and professional audio.
